title: Build LilyGO-style TUI shell and shared widgets
description: Why this exists: the visual identity needs to be implemented consistently across screens. What needs to be done: build the terminal app frame, compact status bar, device-like header/footer, signal/battery/GPS/BLE/IP indicators, tab or mode navigation, message cards/list rows, modal prompts, config rows, log rows, and diagnostics fields using the selected TUI framework. Acceptance criteria: widgets approximate the LilyGO reference within terminal constraints; layouts are stable at common terminal sizes; no screen depends on color alone; keyboard-only operation works; snapshot tests or recorded terminal renders cover core widgets.
notes:
Implementation evidence (2026-07-02): added native Textual shell in python/src/lichen/tui/native.py with LilyGO-style one-line status bar, mode nav, single active pane, command bar, dashboard/chats/nodes/mesh/config/logs/diag/help/quit placeholder screens, keyboard-only navigation (Tab/Shift+Tab, [/], 1-7, Enter, /, ?, q with confirmation, Esc/n cancel), responsive row widths on terminal resize, and plain-text Static rendering so bracketed tab/status labels are visible and not Rich markup. Exposed NativeClientApp/ShellStatus from lichen.tui and added lichen-native-tui console script while preserving simulator lichen-tui. Added python/tests/tui/test_native.py coverage for bounded rows, core widgets, active panes, key navigation, prompt paths, SVG render substrings for tab/config status text, and 60-column resize behavior.

Validation: cd python && uv run ruff check src/lichen/tui tests/tui pyproject.toml -> pass; uv run mypy src/lichen/tui tests/tui -> pass; uv run pytest tests/tui tests/client -q -> 45 passed in 1.65s; git diff --check -> pass. No Zephyr/EC2 build required for this Python-only TUI shell slice.

Code review: first review found missing keyboard actions/static split layout/incomplete screen map/config field issues; fixed. Second review found Rich markup hiding bracketed labels, advertised missing commands, missing quit prompt, nonresponsive fixed widths, weak render coverage; fixed. Final re-review by Carson the 6th: clean/no remaining findings. Final re-review by Parfit the 6th: clean/no remaining blocking findings.
close_reason: Completed native TUI shell and shared widget slice with passing Python checks and clean independent re-reviews.
